MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SUSAN SOLERIOU's Notice Of Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to plead "special circumstances." Plaintiff may file an amended complaint within 10 days following the deposition of Ms. Soteriou. (301/DM/CL) Reporter: Rhonda Fung, CSR: 4819
